email_draft.subject: Cutting AML review time at Bitpanda
email_draft.body:
Hi {first_name},

Saw Bitpanda is scaling and figured your exposure to crypto, cross-border payments is probably eating analyst hours right now.

We built a system that auto-scores transaction risk and drafts SAR narratives in seconds instead of hours, cutting manual review time significantly for teams your size.

Worth a 15-min look?

Best,
{sender_name}
email_draft.upgrade_note: Replace this template with a Claude API call for true per-account personalization.
